---
id: authorization-group-role-assignments-controller-list
title: "List role assignments for a group"
description: "List all role assignments granted to a group. Each assignment represents a role granted to the group on a resource."
sidebar_label: "List role assignments for a group"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

  as={"h1"}

  children={"List role assignments for a group"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/authorization/groups/{group_id}/role_assignments"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all role assignments granted to a group. Each assignment represents a role granted to the group on a resource.
